sum: The result of an experiment by Irenicus, this female fox is obsessed with food. She can transform into a muloup or a major muloup, changing her stats in the process.
no: The result of an experiment by Irenicus, this female fox is obsessed with food. She can transform into a muloup or a major muloup, changing her stats in the process.

co.n: Moddie, "the fox monster in your backpack"
